description_long: This stadium features a semi-circular, open-air design with a central arena surrounded by tiered seating. The structure is set within a landscaped green area, with palm trees and other vegetation providing a natural backdrop. The seating area is partially enclosed by a modern, curved facade, which appears to be constructed from concrete and glass panels. There are two prominent stairways leading up to the main seating area, and a wide, paved entrance path. The arena itself is open, with a blue surface that may represent water or a synthetic field. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on blending built and natural elements.
description: A modern, semi-circular stadium with tiered seating, landscaped surroundings, and a curved facade accented by palm trees. The open arena features a blue central area and prominent stairways.
description_view_0: From this view, the stadium's curved seating and landscaped green area are visible, with palm trees accenting the rear.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the main entrance path and one of the stairways leading up to the seating area.
description_view_2: The front view shows the full width of the stadium, both stairways, and the open blue arena at the center.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the curved facade, the arrangement of palm trees, and the side entrance area.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is defined by a sweeping, curved concrete wall interspersed with glass panels, creating a sleek and modern appearance. Vertical supports and railings are visible, and the structure is softened by the integration of palm trees and landscaped greenery. The surface treatment is predominantly matte, with subtle textural variation from the concrete and glass.
attribute_entrance_type: The primary entrances are wide, open stairways flanked by low walls, leading directly to the seating area. These entrances are at ground level and designed for high foot traffic, with no visible gates or turnstiles.
